and home health aide services three or four times per week for personal care, 
assistance with ambulation as mobility increases, and assistance with repetitive speech 
exercises as her impaired speech improves. The home health aide also provides 
incidental household services such as preparation of meals, light cleaning and taking out 
the trash. The patient lives with an elderly frail sister who is disabled and who cannot
